visual_description: A medium shot captures a man and a woman in a hospital room. The woman, with highlighted brown hair, lies in a hospital bed, propped up on pillows. She wears a white hospital gown and looks up with a concerned and slightly pained expression. The man, with dark, styled hair, leans over her, looking down with a worried and confused look. He is dressed in a light-colored jacket over a collared shirt and a striped tie. The background shows the typical environment of a hospital room, with medical equipment and an IV stand visible. The audio features a short, tense exchange between two women in what sounds like a hospital room. A woman with a slightly strained and concerned voice states, "10 centimeters." A man immediately responds with a loud, high-pitched, and confused "What?" The camera cuts to a medium shot of a woman in a white lab coat standing in the same room. She has reddish-brown, shoulder-length hair and is looking off-camera with a serious, slightly stern expression. She is wearing a striped shirt and a name tag on her coat.
